title: AD HOC COMMITTEE ON THE 2028 OLYMPIC AND PARALYMPIC GAMES REPORT relative to relocating the 2028 Olympic and Paralympic Games (LA28) Closing Ceremonies to the Los Angeles Memorial Coliseum (Coliseum).

appearances.section: Items for which Public Hearings Have Been Held
appearances.recommendation: APPROVE the following changes to the Official Opening and Closing Ceremonies for LA28: The relocation of the Olympic Games Closing Ceremony from both the Coliseum and the Stadium in Inglewood to solely the Coliseum. The relocation of the Paralympic Games Closing Ceremony from the Stadium in Inglewood to the Coliseum. Fiscal Impact Statement: Neither the City Administrative Officer nor the Chief Legislative Analyst has completed a financial analysis of this report. Community Impact Statement: None submitted Report from Ad Hoc Committee on the 2024 Summer Olympics - 10-29-25 Motion (Price - Harris-Dawson) dated 8-26-25

attachments.text: Report from Ad Hoc Committee on the 2024 Summer Olympics - 10-29-25
